allow:
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/v1/process-definitions \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "X-User-Id: user1" \\
  -d '{
    "Name": "请假申请流程",
    "ProcessType": "LeaveRequest",
    "NodeTemplatesJson": "[]"
  }')

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/v1/tasks/pending \\
  -H "X-User-Id: user2" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
tasks=d['data']['items']
for t in tasks:
    print\(f'TaskId: {t[\\"taskId\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'InstanceId: {t[\\"instanceId\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Process: {t[\\"processName\\"]} | BusinessKey: {t[\\"businessKey\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'StepType: {t[\\"stepType\\"]} | PendingSince: {t[\\"pendingSince\\"]}'\)
    print\(\)
")
